provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly scene concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture, visible brushstrokes, architectural interior or exterior, interior of a border fortress tariff inspection office — narrow angular room with a military alien official behind heated dark stone desk, seized cargo visible through a window into the holding bay where crates have gathered dust for years, dim amber lighting, weapon racks on walls, the air of a place where everything is negotiable but nothing is acknowledged as negotiable, border corruption expressed through architecture
